case.description: Alterations, additions and associated works to an approved residential flat building (amending DA to DA0038/23) under SEPP (Housing) 2021

proposal.development_type: residential flat building (in-fill affordable housing, SEPP (Housing) 2021)
extracted_from: assessment_report.pdf p18 (GFA 9,114.1m2, FSR 2.71:1; affordable GFA 872.9m2 = 9.5% of total)
assessment_report.pdf p19 (cl 4.6 states max height 30.48m; permitted 26.4m incl 20% bonus)

dcp_facts.site_coverage_note: Council disputes the applicant's site coverage and deep soil calculations (assessment_report.pdf p11); increase of +134.5 m2 over approved (p12).

submissions_summary.theme: Traffic generation and road network impacts
submissions_summary.report_response: Adequate on-site parking; GTIA 2024 rates give ~8 AM / 6 PM peak trips for 53 dwellings — minor and acceptable.

submissions_summary.theme: Street parking, footpath access and blockages during construction
submissions_summary.report_response: Manageable via Construction Traffic Management Plan condition (as per DA0038/23 condition 6) if approved.
Acoustic report relates to a previous set of plans; forms part of refusal reason 14. Construction noise conditionable.

submissions_summary.theme: Increased density / unclear FSR and built form
submissions_summary.report_response: FSR calculation unclear and non-compliant; underpins refusal reason 6 (affordable housing) and reason 1 (GFA).

refusal_reasons: Gross floor area does not comply (FSR miscalculated under s16 SEPP Housing; no cl 4.6 request for FSR)
Non-compliant building height, insufficient information, unsatisfactory cl 4.6 request
Desired future character (s20(3) SEPP Housing; TOD Alternative Scheme 29m/1.8:1)
Site coverage and deep soil landscape area
s4.15(1)(b)-(e) unacceptable impacts, unsuitable site, submissions, public interest
Inadequate information regarding affordable housing management
Architectural plans, survey and related information inadequate

effective_standards.note: SEPP (Housing) 2021 Ch 2/6 overrides the KLEP mapped controls for in-fill affordable housing here. Base FSR 2.2:1 and base height 22m apply; s16 permits up to +30% GFA/height only if >=15% of total GFA is affordable, and any bonus requires >=10% affordable (s16(2)). Council applied 22m + 20% = 26.4m as the permitted height.
effective_standards.landscape_min_rule: lesser of 35m2/dwelling or 30% of site area
citations: assessment_report.pdf p17 (s19 non-discretionary standards: site area 450m2 min; landscape lesser of 35m2/dwelling or 30% site)
assessment_report.pdf p18 (site FSR 2.2:1; s16(1) +30% => 2.86:1 if 15% affordable; affordable below 10% min under s16(2))
assessment_report.pdf p19 (s16(3) height uplift; permitted 26.4m incl additional 20%; breach 4.08m)
